why_this_action.summary: Refresh the stale primary-repo-flat contact packet after the manual-delivery truth fix so active review-window targets stay excluded and the packet is actionable.
supporting_reasons: primary_repo_flat_contact_discovery_latest.json now exposes AI Saying as a packet-executable feedback-form target.
The executor now excludes active manual-delivery targets and recognizes refreshed target-specific prep logs.
A truthful Codeberg-first packet for the changed target set is better than another empty-board guard note.

result.summary: Detected that the primary-repo-flat publisher contact packet already matches the discovered target set, so this run enforced follow-through instead of regenerating the same packet.
